Package com.djrapitops.plan.delivery.rendering.json.datapoint.types

  • Class
    Description
    AfkTime
     
    AfkTimePercentage
     
    ChunksAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average CHUNKS usage within the timeframe.
    CPUAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average CPU usage within the timeframe.
    DatapointModule
    Dagger module for registering Set<Datapoint<?>> for use in constructors so that individual ones don't need to be injected.
    Deaths
    Datapoint for total death count.
    EntitiesAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average ENTITIES usage within the timeframe.
    MobKills
    Datapoint for mob kill counts.
    MostActiveGameMode
     
    MostActiveWorld
     
    MSPTAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT within the timeframe.
    NewPlayerRetention
    Datapoint for New player retention.
    NewPlayers
    Datapoint for new player count.
    PlayerKills
    Datapoint for player kill counts (PvP kills).
    PlayersOnlineAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average Players Online within the timeframe.
    PlayersOnlineCurrent
    Datapoint for looking up current Players online count.
    PlayersOnlinePeak
    Datapoint for looking up maximum Player online count within the timeframe.
    Playtime
     
    PlaytimePerPlayerAverage
    Datapoint for average playtime per player.
    RAMAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average RAM usage within the timeframe.
    RegularPlayers
    Datapoint for regular player count.
    ServerOccupied
     
    ServerPie
    Data point implementation for the Server Pie Graph.
    ServerPie.Content
     
    ServerPlaytimeForFilter
    Utility for getting playtime per server name based on a filter.
    SessionCount
    Datapoint for session count.
    SessionLengthAverage
    Datapoint for average session length.
    TPSAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average TPS within the timeframe.
    TPSLowSpikes
    Datapoint for Low TPS spikes.
    UniquePlayersCount
    Datapoint for unique player count.
    UniquePlayersPerDayAverage
    Datapoint for Unique players average per day.
    UptimeCurrent
    Datapoint for looking up current uptime of the servers.
    WorldPie
    Data point implementation for the World Pie Graph.
    WorldPie.Content
     
    WorldTimesForFilter
